NOVO-B.CO.name: Novo Nordisk B
bull: Market-leading GLP-1 portfolio (Ozempic, Wegovy) with strong recurring demand and brand loyalty
CagriSema and next-gen pipeline offer significant upside if Phase 3 readouts are positive
High-margin business with robust free cash flow supporting buybacks and dividends
bear: Eli Lilly's tirzepatide (Mounjaro/Zepbound) is gaining market share, eroding Novo's near-monopoly
Stock still trades at a premium valuation despite ~35% drawdown from 2024 peak
Patent cliff risk and biosimilar pressure on older insulin portfolio over the next 3-5 years
NOVO-B.CO.summary: Novo Nordisk's GLP-1 dominance and pipeline optionality outweigh competitive headwinds at current valuation.

MAERSK-B.CO.name: Maersk B
bull: Integrated logistics strategy diversifies revenue away from volatile spot freight rates
Strong balance sheet with net cash position enables capital returns and opportunistic M&A
Red Sea disruptions continuing to keep effective capacity tight and rates above pre-2020 norms
bear: Structural overcapacity returning to container shipping as new mega-vessel deliveries ramp in 2025-2026
Global trade volume at risk from US tariff escalation and macro slowdown reducing demand
Logistics integration investments are margin-dilutive in the short term vs. pure shipping profitability
MAERSK-B.CO.summary: Maersk's logistics pivot is strategically sound but near-term freight rate pressure and trade uncertainty create a balanced risk/reward.

DSV.CO.name: DSV
bull: DB Schenker acquisition (closed late 2024) makes DSV the world's largest freight forwarder with unmatched scale
Proven integration playbook — DSV has consistently delivered synergies ahead of schedule on prior deals
Air and sea freight volumes recovering, leveraging DSV's asset-light model for high operating leverage
bear: DB Schenker integration is the largest in DSV's history, carrying meaningful execution and culture risk
High leverage taken on to finance acquisition limits financial flexibility if volumes disappoint
Freight forwarding margins under pressure as pandemic-era rate spikes fully normalize
DSV.CO.summary: DSV's DB Schenker integration cements global leadership and the scale advantages should drive superior returns as freight markets recover.
